title: M'Yalfor'ac Order
content:

{{Quote|There are few groups who hate us more, and I believe we stand little chance of ever befriending the Bitthævrians. Our best option would be to just steer clear of the area altogether.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Ayla Shar's intelligence report about the m'Yalfor'ac Order|<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
The '''m'Yalfor'ac Order''' was a military order of the [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] that ruled over parts of [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]], which used the [[Guiteica Militia]] to dominate their control across the planet. The Order were anti-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]], being dedicated to eradicating the two.

==Description==
[[File:MYalforacOrder-AIR.png|thumb|right|250px|M'Yalfor'ac Order officers [[Tarlo Ganar]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Quaal Tavier Catharius|Tavier]] and [[Guardian (rank)|Major-Guardian]] [[Aul Tarrus Vishav|Tarrus]]]]
The M'Yalfor'ac Order was based on the Guiteican continent of [[L'Quar'ta|l'Quart'a]] and went under the leadership of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Quaal Tavier Catharius]] and four of his subordinates (two officers from the Guiteica Militia, an [[Adnerem]] mercenary and [[Tarlo Ganar]], a Khil tactician and naval commander). Apart from these two individuals, the m'Yalfor'ac Order was made up only of Bitthævrians. At times, they represented more than 80 % of the entire Guiteica Militia.<ref name="air" />

It was dedicated to eradicating two groups of beings, [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]]. The Bothans were particularly hated due to their avoidance of direct confrontation, a cultural norm which the Bitthævrians could not comprehend nor stand for. They also hated the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and attacked the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] due to their Republic-like values and methods and their goal of restoring the hated Republic.<ref name="air" />

==History==
[[File:MYalforacOrderVehicles-AIR.png|thumb|left|250px|M'Yalfor'ac Order weaponry]]
Around five decades before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Galactic Republic increased its activity in the [[Kadok Regions/Legends|Kadok Regions]]. This was deemed unacceptable for Kadok-native Bitthævrians, who rebelled in protest, using their forces as an offending army. The Galactic Republic, wanting to see the Order destroyed, made the nearby [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] species believe that the Bitthævrians constituted a real threat to [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]], in order to secure their assistance.<ref name="air" />

The M'Yalfor'ac Order lived with a reputation for having defeated several [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] shortly before the birth of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but in reality, they themselves had nearly been destroyed by a military force consisting of Kaleesh soldiers that was led by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]]. The military action decimated the m'Yalfor'ac Order, but it was reconstituted.<ref name="air" />

When the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] was established in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the m'Yalfor'ac Order was not as eager to defy the Empire, since it regarded any different government as better than the Old Republic.<ref name="air" />

Eventually, the Order had grown to a force numbering more than 700,000 fanatically loyal troops by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], plus a great arsenal of outdated equipment, including obsolete snubfighters (such as [[C-73 Tracker starfighter|C-73 Trackers]], [[Toscan 8-Q starfighter|Toscan 8-Q Fighters]] and [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]]) and similarly-outdated ground vehicles (such as internal combustion treaded tanks, [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT Walkers]] and security [[Espo Walker 91|Espo Walkers]] which rumor says were stolen from a [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|CSA]] light freighter traveling through Kadok Regions en route to the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]).<ref name="air" />

[[Vulca Minerals]] tried to perform [[yttrium]] mining activities in [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]], but the pushy attitude of Vulca officers led to a more aggressive attitude from the m'Yalfor'ac Order. The crisis was witnessed by Vulca officer and later Rebel lieutenant [[Ayla Shar]]. Since that crisis, [[Kadok Resources]], a Bitthævrian-controlled operation, managed all of Guiteica's exports.<ref name="air" />
